content.text:
Sure! In Hindi, you can say "नमस्ते" (Namaste) to greet someone. It's a common and respectful way to say hello. If you want to make it a bit more formal, you can say "नमस्ते जी" (Namaste Ji).

Here's a quick pronunciation guide:
- "नमस्ते" (Namaste) – Say "Na-muh-shte"
- "नमस्ते जी" (Nama
